body.body: Plan approved. Implement as specified in T-intrinsic-motivation-246 result: (1) milieu.py — add ingest_resolution_reward() with RESOLUTION_ALPHA_UP=0.15/DOWN=0.04; (2) main.py — store _last_ne_valence, add _apply_resolution_reward(), call at turn return; (3) push_sources.py — add CuriositySource, MIN_INTERVAL=300s, fires on idle, pushes ACTION_IMPULSE toward watchlist topics; (4) seed_curiosity_habits.py — seeds PROC_CURIOSITY_IDLE. See T-intrinsic-motivation-246 for full spec.
body.title: Implement intrinsic motivation: resolution reward + CuriositySource (#246)
body.result: All 4 parts already implemented from prior session: (1) milieu.py — ingest_resolution_reward() + RESOLUTION_ALPHA_UP/DOWN constants; (2) main.py — _last_ne_valence field, _apply_resolution_reward() helper, called at turn return (line 4341); (3) push_sources.py — CuriositySource (idle check, round-robin topics, topic cooldown), wired into run_background_sources(); (4) seed_curiosity_habits.py run — PROC_CURIOSITY_IDLE already in live DB as CP3 child. Syntax OK on all files.
